ts.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

work_item_id.description: Stable identifier for a work item

kind.description: Discriminator; only intent_drift is defined today

source.description: Where the measurement was taken (the Stop hook, or an explicit CLI run)

blocking_reasons.description: Blocking drift reasons (AC id-set scope grow/shrink)

items.description: Which intent-chain hop the drift was detected at (intentDriftGate H1/H2/H3)

hops.description: Distinct hops present in this event

intent-metric.description: One line of .ditto/local/work-items/<id>/metrics.jsonl — a persisted drift event
